title: Lexicon
description: Top-level array of glossary entries (content/lexicon.json), spec sec-5 verbatim: [{term, one_liner, deeper, related[], seen_in[]}]. Phase 1 seeds data/lexicon.json = [] (empty) -- the 30-term backfill is Phase 3.

deeper.description: ~3-sentence deeper cut. Phase 3 embeds the entry's live source citation as an inline <a> anchor within this prose field (schema has no separate source_url field -- see IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md).

seen_in.description: Card IDs this term has appeared in (auto-grown by the analyst).
